# mixer

**Instance Property**

The audio stream’s output pipeline.

## Declaration

```swift
var mixer: PHASEMixer { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value based on the definition initializer’s `mixerDefinition` argument. See [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEPushStreamNodeDefinition/init(mixerDefinition:format:)].

## Inspecting Stream Properties

- **format**: The format of the audio stream data.
